'''Swagg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] operating in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] shortly before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. Swagg was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Roos Tarpals/Legends|Roos Tarpals]] while stealing ancient [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] art on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

He owned a trio of droids designated [[3-S]], [[4-S]] and [[5-S]].
